RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/mysql/crdatabase_schema.bash
RuleSet.GenRule: # # Create the database tables # if [ -f $dbadminfilename_CreateAllTables$ ]; then echo " Creating database tables ..." echo "" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename echo "# Executing script $dbadminfilename_CreateAllTables$" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename ./$dbadminfilename_CreateAllTables$ -U $$mysqluser -P $$mysqlpwd -L $$logfilename fi

# # Create the database indexes # if [ -f $dbadminfilename_CreateAllIndexes$ ]; then echo " Creating database indexes ..." echo "#" >>$$logfilename echo "# Executing script $dbadminfilename_CreateAllIndexes$" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename ./$dbadminfilename_CreateAllIndexes$ -U $$mysqluser -P $$mysqlpwd -L $$logfilename fi

# # Create the database relations # if [ -f $dbadminfilename_CreateAllRelations$ ]; then echo " Creating database relations ..." echo "" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename echo "# Executing script $dbadminfilename_CreateAllRelations$" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename ./$dbadminfilename_CreateAllRelations$ -U $$mysqluser -P $$mysqlpwd -L $$logfilename fi

# # Load initial data # if [ -f $dbadminfilename_LoadAllData$ ]; then echo " Loading initial data ..." echo "" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename echo "# Executing script $dbadminfilename_LoadAllData$" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename ./$dbadminfilename_LoadAllData$ -U $$mysqluser -P $$mysqlpwd -L $$logfilename fi

# # Create the database triggers # if [ -f $dbadminfilename_CreateAllTriggers$ ]; then echo " Creating database triggers ..." echo "" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename echo "# Executing script $dbadminfilename_CreateAllTriggers$" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename ./$dbadminfilename_CreateAllTriggers$ -U $$mysqluser -P $$mysqlpwd -L $$logfilename fi

# # Create the stored procedureds # if [ -f $dbadminfilename_CreateAllStoredProcs$ ]; then echo " Creating stored procedures..." echo "" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename echo "# Executing script $dbadminfilename_CreateAllStoredProcs$" >>$$logfilename echo "#" >>$$logfilename ./$dbadminfilename_CreateAllStoredProcs$ -U $$mysqluser -P $$mysqlpwd -L $$logfilename fi
